title: Old Pre 1.13 Water
description: Adds back the pre 1.13 water texture and colour
body:
The new water color in 1.13+ has always looked bad (at least in my opinion). The water just isn't as colourful and blue as it was before. So I made a resource pack to change that back. 



![Old water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bae7a338f1b2dcafde0d964f30c344b3bd0c1a4_0.webp)

![Requires Polytone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2e6f202627b7f7720ea736ad2db88ec888c4e1b_0.webp)
